Detect Select Multiple Separator Dynamically

detect_select_multiple_separator.Rd

Scans the columns of the active clean_data/raw_data dataset to determine whether the separator for select_multiple choice columns is a dot (.) or a slash (/).

Usage

detect_select_multiple_separator(ref_name, clean_data = NULL)

Arguments

ref_name

The name of the select_multiple question.

clean_data

The active dataset. If NULL, looks for clean_data or raw_data in the environment.

Value

A character string, either "." or "/".
